refinement_sections.content: We need to create a tool that can look at English sentences and figure out their structure. This means we have to find out what parts of the sentences are and how they fit together.

The parser should mainly work with statements, but it also needs to understand questions and commands. We should think about what types of sentences to include, like simple ones and maybe some complex ones.
We need the parser to label different parts of sentences, like subjects and verbs. It should be efficient, which means it shouldn't take too long to analyze sentences.
Since we don't have a specific set of sentences, we should find some examples online or use common sentences from books. We will need to pick a variety of sentences to test the parser.
To check if the parser works well, we can look at how many sentences it gets right versus wrong. It would be good to compare it to other parsers to see if ours is good.
We need to write a report explaining how we built the parser and why we made certain choices. This report should be clear and cover the main ideas.
